# Tool Definition Schema

Reference for tool definition manifests used to describe typed workflow tools.

- schema: `../../../schemas/deck-tooldefinition.schema.json`

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1
kind: ToolDefinition
metadata:
  name: File
spec:
  version: v1
  summary: Manage files
  category: shared
  inputSchema: {}
```

## Realistic Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1
kind: ToolDefinition
metadata:
  name: File
  description: Manage files on the local node
spec:
  version: v1
  summary: Manage files on the local node
  category: shared
  offlineAllowed: true
  requires:
    root: true
  inputSchema: {}
  idempotency:
    mode: by-output
    keys: [path]
```

## Validation Rules


## Notes

- `ToolDefinition` describes a typed tool contract rather than a workflow step instance.
- `inputSchema` stays open-ended because it embeds another schema fragment rather than a fixed workflow payload.
